title: Lockout Resource Pack
description: Lockout Textures for Truffle's Minecraft Lockout Data Pack
body:
## Lockout Resource Pack

Optional (but recommended) resource pack for my [lockout data pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lockout).

Provides more specific textures for some goals to make it easier to distinguish between similar goals or goals that utilize the same texture.

This texture pack will not interfere with any normal game textures, it simply provides custom model data for some items for display on the lockout board.
